name: hyper-pipeline
description: AI execution engine built on Anthropic Harness Design. 13 commands, 4 agents, 11 skills. Planner→Generator→Evaluator GAN-inspired feedback loop with few-shot calibrated evaluator, UI quality enforcement (Uncodixfy + frontend-design), backend quality criteria (5x2pts), Claude Peers physical separation, OpenSpace self-improving skills. Full dev lifecycle: plan, build, eval, design, present, deploy, fix, refactor, test, CI/CD. Obsidian vault integration for project management.
